args.rawMarkdown:
### Communication Pattern Modeling

The system models different collective communication patterns based on training parallelism strategies:

<lark-table rows="7" cols="3" header-row="true" column-widths="251,251,251">

  <lark-tr>
    <lark-td>
      Operation
    </lark-td>
    <lark-td>
      Description
    </lark-td>
    <lark-td>
      Typical Use Case
    </lark-td>
  </lark-tr>
  <lark-tr>
    <lark-td>
      `All_Reduce`
    </lark-td>
    <lark-td>
      Reduce and broadcast result
    </lark-td>
    <lark-td>
      Gradient synchronization
    </lark-td>
  </lark-tr>
  <lark-tr>
    <lark-td>
      `All_Gather`
    </lark-td>
    <lark-td>
      Gather data from all ranks
    </lark-td>
    <lark-td>
      Parameter collection
    </lark-td>
  </lark-tr>
  <lark-tr>
    <lark-td>
      `Reduce_Scatter`
    </lark-td>
    <lark-td>
      Reduce and distribute chunks
    </lark-td>
    <lark-td>
      Distributed gradient updates
    </lark-td>
  </lark-tr>
  <lark-tr>
    <lark-td>
      `All_to_All`
    </lark-td>
    <lark-td>
      Personalized all-to-all exchange
    </lark-td>
    <lark-td>
      Expert routing in MoE
    </lark-td>
  </lark-tr>
  <lark-tr>
    <lark-td>
      `All_Reduce_All_to_All`
    </lark-td>
    <lark-td>
      Combined operation
    </lark-td>
    <lark-td>
      Hybrid communication patterns
    </lark-td>
  </lark-tr>
  <lark-tr>
    <lark-td>
      `All_Reduce_NVLS`
    </lark-td>
    <lark-td>
      NVLS-optimized AllReduce
    </lark-td>
    <lark-td>
      High-bandwidth AllReduce
    </lark-td>
  </lark-tr>
</lark-table>

<lark-table rows="5" cols="3" header-row="true" column-widths="251,251,251">

  <lark-tr>
    <lark-td>
      Parallelism Type
    </lark-td>
    <lark-td>
      Communication Pattern
    </lark-td>
    <lark-td>
      Collective Operations
    </lark-td>
  </lark-tr>
  <lark-tr>
    <lark-td>
      Tensor Parallelism (TP)
    </lark-td>
    <lark-td>
      Parameter synchronization within TP group
    </lark-td>
    <lark-td>
      `allreduce`, `allgather`, `reducescatter`, `alltoall`
    </lark-td>
  </lark-tr>
  <lark-tr>
    <lark-td>
      Data Parallelism (DP)
    </lark-td>
    <lark-td>
      Gradient synchronization across DP group
    </lark-td>
    <lark-td>
      `allreduce`, `allgather`, `reducescatter`
    </lark-td>
  </lark-tr>
  <lark-tr>
    <lark-td>
      Expert Parallelism (EP)
    </lark-td>
    <lark-td>
      Expert routing and load balancing
    </lark-td>
    <lark-td>
      `allgather`, `reducescatter`, `alltoall`
    </lark-td>
  </lark-tr>
  <lark-tr>
    <lark-td>
      Pipeline Parallelism (PP)
    </lark-td>
    <lark-td>
      Activation/gradient passing between stages
    </lark-td>
    <lark-td>
      `send`, `recv`
    </lark-td>
  </lark-tr>
</lark-table>

example

<lark-table rows="8" cols="4" header-row="true" column-widths="189,189,189,189">

  <lark-tr>
    <lark-td>
      Layer Type
    </lark-td>
    <lark-td>
      Forward Communication
    </lark-td>
    <lark-td>
      Backward Communication
    </lark-td>
    <lark-td>
      Parallelism Type
    </lark-td>
  </lark-tr>
  <lark-tr>
    <lark-td>
      **embedding_layer**
    </lark-td>
    <lark-td>
      AllReduce
    </lark-td>
    <lark-td>
      None
    </lark-td>
    <lark-td>
      TP
    </lark-td>
  </lark-tr>
  <lark-tr>
    <lark-td>
      **attention_column**
    </lark-td>
    <lark-td>
      AllGather
    </lark-td>
    <lark-td>
      ReduceScatter
    </lark-td>
    <lark-td>
      TP
    </lark-td>
  </lark-tr>
  <lark-tr>
    <lark-td>
      **attention_row**
    </lark-td>
    <lark-td>
      ReduceScatter
    </lark-td>
    <lark-td>
      AllGather
    </lark-td>
    <lark-td>
      TP
    </lark-td>
  </lark-tr>
  <lark-tr>
    <lark-td>
      **mlp_moelayer**
    </lark-td>
    <lark-td>
      AllGather, AllToAll
    </lark-td>
    <lark-td>
      AllGather, AllToAll
    </lark-td>
    <lark-td>
      TP+EP
    </lark-td>
  </lark-tr>
  <lark-tr>
    <lark-td>
      **grad_gather**
    </lark-td>
    <lark-td>
      None
    </lark-td>
    <lark-td>
      AllGather
    </lark-td>
    <lark-td>
      DP
    </lark-td>
  </lark-tr>
  <lark-tr>
    <lark-td>
      **grad_param_comm**
    </lark-td>
    <lark-td>
      None
    </lark-td>
    <lark-td>
      ReduceScatter
    </lark-td>
    <lark-td>
      DP
    </lark-td>
  </lark-tr>
  <lark-tr>
    <lark-td>
      **moe_grad_norm**
    </lark-td>
    <lark-td>
      None
    </lark-td>
    <lark-td>
      AllGather/ReduceScatter
    </lark-td>
    <lark-td>
      DP+EP
    </lark-td>
  </lark-tr>
</lark-table>
